description: The 'order-management' project has architectural issues where the 'model' package depends on the 'service' package, creating circular dependencies. Refactor the code to break these cycles so that no class in 'com.example.order.model' imports anything from 'com.example.order.service'. Address the specific dependencies in 'Order.java' (calling 'DiscountService') and 'Customer.java' (calling 'FormattingService'). Ensure the project compiles and all 8 unit tests pass.
